hypothesis: If universal machine learning interatomic potentials can accurately represent MOFs, then they will reproduce DFT-level structural optimization results, maintain MD stability under NpT conditions at 300 K and 1 bar, predict bulk moduli within close agreement to DFT via Birch-Murnaghan fits, and yield 300 K heat capacities in agreement with Phonopy calculations, because they are trained on diverse MOF datasets and include dispersion-corrected interactions.
